title: UX Research Toolkit — Actions Layer
description: Layer schema extending each phase with behavioral and cognitive data. Corresponds to NN/g Zone B rows: what the user does, thinks, is frustrated by, and what opportunities emerge.

actions.description: What the persona physically does during this phase. Observable behaviour, written in present tense. Can include multiple actions separated by ellipses or semicolons.
examples: Observa a Rocky levantarse con dificultad y le prepara su medicamento

thoughts.description: Internal monologue or questions running through the persona's mind. Written in first-person or close third-person.
examples: ¿Le dolerá más hoy? No sé si estoy haciendo suficiente por él

frustrations.description: Specific friction points, blockers, or sources of negative emotion the persona encounters in this phase.
examples: No puede medir el nivel de dolor objetivamente; depende de señales visuales ambiguas

opportunities.description: Design or product opportunities surfaced by the frustrations and unmet needs in this phase.
examples: Herramienta de evaluación diaria de dolor/movilidad con escala visual
